hero_subtitle: SFTY streamlines provider outputs into unified compliance workflows with AI support, enabling efficient reviews, audit-ready evidence, and consistent decision tracking across all digital asset operations.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance review depends on manual handoffs
problem_description: VASP compliance teams struggle with fragmented provider outputs that require repeated manual interpretation and routing. This slows review speed, weakens audit trails and makes it harder to maintain consistent decisions across cases and workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider outputs, applies internal rules, automates case routing and preserves decision evidence while using AI to assist compliance teams with review prioritization and audit-ready workflows.
workflow_title: From provider checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY routes provider outputs through risk-based rules, AI-assisted review, case workflows, decision logging and evidence preservation for audit-ready compliance control.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond manual reviews. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into structured workflows, decision logs, cases, and audit-ready evidence to streamline AI-assisted compliance review for VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY delivers a controlled layer for VASPs to orchestrate provider outputs, preserve audit-ready evidence and support bank due diligence within enterprise deployment standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support AI-assisted compliance case reviews
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how AI helps triage alerts and route cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how decision logs and evidence support audits
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for regulated VASP workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a compliance control layer that connects provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions, evidence and reports tailored for VASP compliance operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support AI-assisted review workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY’s AI-assisted review supports alert triage, case prioritization, risk explanation and workflow recommendations while maintaining human oversight for final decisions.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and linked evidence to support audit-ready workflows, supporting reviewability and traceability of compliance actions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect our existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing onboarding, KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs within one compliance operating model.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace existing providers; it connects their results into connected, auditable workflows without disrupting the underlying service providers.
final_title: Turn provider outputs into structured compliance cases
final_description: Explore how SFTY uses AI-assisted review to connect alerts, decisions and evidence into controlled compliance workflows for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
